gauge.name: North Fork Shoshone River at Wapiti

impacts.statement: Record stage and flow---20,000 cfs (6/9/1981). Previous Location.
Major Flood. Buffalo Bill State Park camp sites near left bank are inundated--5 miles downstream of gage. Flooding of agricultural land 0.5-1.5 miles downstream of gage.
Moderate Flood. Extensive flooding of camp sites along left bank at Buffalo Bill State Park--5 miles downstream of gage. Minor Flooding of agricultural land 0.5-1.5 miles downstream of gage.
Flood stage. Minor flooding of camp sites along left bank at Buffalo Bill State Park--5 miles downstream of gage.
Bankfull/Action stage. Water approaching low areas of camp sties along left bank at Buffalo Bill State Park--5 miles downstream of gage.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
